channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A plastic bollard has been dumped next to the dustbins in Lypiatt Lane, at the back of the houses in Lypiatt terrace.e, 19th March
item.description:
It is currently next to the dustbins at the rear of houses 6 and 7 Lypiatt terrace, in Lypiatt lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Lypiatt Terrace, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extreme surface delamination added to so many pot holes., 19th March
item.description:
Between the traffic lights and the junction of Pilgrove way..... there are multiple large delamination / pothole sections. So much so cars are having to skirt on to the wrong side of the road to avoid damaging their cars. This is an accident waiting to happen..... it only a matter of time!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th March
item.description:
Perm repair Cw pothole 500x500mm Rd closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th March
item.description:
15db Pothole CW 600x400x45mm approx Road closure with 15db Marked not measured due to location Stats (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 19th March
item.description:
I saw a Facebook post relating to the closure of post office Lane which I believe is due to close next week. I own a parking space on this road, which is my only source of parking. Can you please confirm that this private property will be accessible via Vehicle for me even with the road closure? Kind regards.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th March
item.description:
Pothole CW 800mm x 450mm x 42mm Road Closure TM On Centre Line (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 19th March
item.description:
2 way traffic sign out of Line. Please pass on to the relevant AHR to arrange repair.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 19th March
item.description:
Damaged Giveway Sign ( out of line ) CW Give and take TM Narrow Lane (Damaged Traffic Sign)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in the middle of the road, causing buses to make our houses shake and stop me from sleeping., 19th March
item.description:
Between 163 and 161 Salisbury Avenue in the road. The road beyond is being resurfaced next week, however this pothole is 5 metres down from where the work starts. It is getting bigger each day due to all the traffic, especially the F bus. Can it be repaired at the same time next were?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163, Salisbury Avenue, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees on a marked public footpath are overhanging my property (this includes path in photos) and branches are touching my garage roof, 19th March
item.description:
Overhanging tree branches are causing a nuisance. Leaf fall into my garden, the path behind it is a big issue during Autumn. Twigs and branches fall onto my shed roof and the guttering serving my garage is blocked with leaf litter and fallen twigs. I have spoken to Tewkesbury Borough Council and they have told me that they are not responsible for this footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Greenacre Way, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th March
item.description:
Pothole CW 600mm x 400mm x 45mm Road Closure TM Narrow Lane Parked Cars (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th March
item.description:
15db Pothole CW 600x400x45mm approx Road closure with 15db Marked not measured due to location (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light at crossing by race course roundabout keeps changing every 30 seconds, despite no one pressing the button, 19th March
item.description:
The traffic light on the pedestrian crossing by the race course roundabout on Evesham Road is faulty. It keeps changing from green to red every 30 seconds despite no one pressing the button. This is causing tailbacks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 19th March
item.description:
Cw gully Needs lifting and resetting Stats required Lane closure (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tesco trolley in stream, 19th March
item.description:
The banks here are steep so use rope and hooks to retrieve it. Thanks for picking this up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
